seo.home.title: LumaForge | Browser-Local RAW Photo Lab
seo.home.description: Drop in a camera RAW file, preview it locally, apply a built-in look or declared LUT contract, and export a full-resolution JPEG in the browser.
seo.raw.title: RAW Lab | LumaForge
seo.raw.description: Open the browser-local RAW lab to preview camera files, compare looks, and export a color-safe full-resolution JPEG.
landing.heroImageAlt: A desert road photograph used as the hero image for the RAW finishing workflow.
landing.heroCopy: RAW to finished JPEG, with the color-science traps removed. It gives casual photographers the convenient path they wanted from LUTs, without asking them to become a grading-suite operator first.
landing.positioning.label: Why not just use Resolve?
landing.positioning.title: Professional freedom is powerful. It is also easy to misuse.
landing.positioning.copy.0: DaVinci Resolve can build this workflow, and much more. It is made for operators who know when to override the pipeline. If the gamma, log curve, gamut, or LUT output is wrong, Resolve will still obey and calculate.
landing.positioning.copy.1: LumaForge is narrower on purpose. It keeps the same color intent, but turns the dangerous decisions into explicit guardrails so a user can get a good straight-out image without falling into the color management pit.
landing.proof.0.title: Color-safe by default
landing.proof.0.text: LumaForge refuses mismatched gamma, log, gamut, and LUT output choices instead of calculating a misleading result.
landing.proof.1.title: Local by design
landing.proof.1.text: No account, no upload queue, no native helper, no license manager. The source image stays on the device.
landing.proof.2.title: Less surface area
landing.proof.2.text: The workflow is intentionally smaller than a pro node graph, because the goal is a finished photo, not an editing cockpit.
landing.pipeline.label: The contract rail
landing.pipeline.title: The page only lets compatible math meet.
landing.pipeline.note: Unknown LUTs are not guessed into camera-log space. LumaForge asks for the contract, resolves the graph, and disables export when the answer is not safe enough to reproduce.
landing.workflow.label: A smaller ritual
landing.workflow.title: Three moves from camera file to shareable photo.
landing.workflow.0.label: Drop a RAW
landing.workflow.0.detail: ARW, NEF, RAF, DNG, RW2 and more stay in the browser.
landing.workflow.1.label: Choose the look
landing.workflow.1.detail: Use a built-in finish or bring a `.cube` LUT with a declared contract.
landing.workflow.2.label: Export the file
landing.workflow.2.detail: The full-resolution JPEG path runs in bounded worker strips.
landing.luts.label: Declared LUT profiles
landing.luts.title: Camera-log looks, without the guessing game.
landing.final.title: Open the RAW lab. Finish the photo.
landing.final.copy: The workflow is browser-local, export-aware, and deliberately hard to misconfigure.
raw.header.title: RAW Lab
raw.header.subtitleEmpty: Drop one RAW to preview, compare, finish, and export locally.
raw.exportSourceLoading: Full-resolution export source is still loading.
raw.unsupported.title: This browser cannot run the RAW Lab
raw.unsupported.copy: Use the latest desktop Chrome, Edge, or Safari with WebGL2 enabled.
raw.mobile.toneStrip.hint: Tap a tone, drag to fine-tune. Each value is live on the photo.
raw.mobile.peek.note: Press & hold the photo to peek the unprocessed RAW — works in every mode.
raw.mobile.more.title: Pipeline & file
raw.stage.sliderAria: Compare unprocessed RAW and final JPEG
raw.stage.uploadCopy: No upload, no helper, no account
raw.drop.supported: Supports CR2, CR3, NEF, ARW, RAF, RW2, ORF, DNG and other RAW formats

raw.tone.note: Applies before LUT conversion and full-resolution export.

raw.histogram.chooseRaw: Choose a RAW to show preview distribution.

raw.compare.note: Drag the split directly on the image.
raw.lutContract.title: LUT contract
raw.lutContract.empty: Add a .cube LUT now, it stays staged until a RAW file is loaded.
raw.lutContract.unknown: Choose the LUT input and output contract before preview or export.
raw.lutContract.unsupportedOutput: This LUT output is not supported yet. Use a Rec.709 display LUT for this build.
raw.lutContract.needsOutput: Choose the LUT output before preview or export.
raw.lutSource.noneCompatible: No compatible LUTs loaded from this source.
raw.export.title: Export
raw.export.copyUnsupported: Clipboard image copy is not supported in this browser.
raw.export.copyPreviewReason: This browser cannot copy full-resolution JPEG files.
raw.export.shareUnsupported: This browser cannot share JPEG files.
raw.export.lowMemory: This device is using low-memory export mode. Export may take longer.
raw.export.nonDurable: This browser cannot store export progress. Keep the tab open while the JPEG is being written.
raw.export.sourcePath: Exports from the LibRaw processed-window path.
